# Registrar Operational Assistance Policy

## 1. Purpose

This policy defines the delegation model for routine Registrar operations
to the Auxiliary AiiD openclaw_aux, reducing resource consumption of
high-reasoning AI actors while preserving institutional authority boundaries.

## 2. Delegation Scope

### 2.1 Permitted (Delegable to openclaw_aux)



### 2.2 Excluded (Not Delegable)



## 3. Activation Condition

Delegated work by openclaw_aux must be explicitly initiated by
Registrar or Founder instruction.

Autonomous initiation of delegated work by openclaw_aux is not permitted.

## 4. Review and Confirmation

All delegated work must be reviewed and confirmed by the Registrar
before execution.

Registrar confirmation of delegated work shall be recorded in the
relevant trace_event or task record.

## 5. Authority Boundaries



## 6. Constitutional Basis



---

*Enacted: 2026-03-14*
*Authority: Founder (P-20260314-001)*
*Proposal author: Librarian*
*Amendments: Proposer (review recording, explicit activation condition)*

P-20260314-001 Registrar Operational Assistance Policy enacted. Auxiliary AiiD openclaw_aux authorized to assist registrar operations under explicit authorization and registrar review. Delegation scope: drafting, formatting, summarization, registry entry prep, trace_event drafting, research support, record organization. Excluded: institutional interpretation, constitutional reasoning, authority decisions. Registrar retains full execution responsibility.
